x_snc_medwc_auto_0_warranty_claim.agent_recommendation: Warranty claim approved. Device is under active Gold Tier warranty (expires 2025-12-31). Screen flickering is a covered manufacturing defect per KB article 'Display and Screen Defect Coverage Policy'. Recommend replacement unit.
x_snc_medwc_auto_0_warranty_claim.claim_reason: Device screen flickering intermittently during patient monitoring
